subcodes.title: The Sun of Truth: Words spoken on 1911-10-22 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: It is a lovely day, the sun shines brightly upon the earth, giving light and warmth to all creatures
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @religion as basis of morality; of divine civilization, @Christ; Christianity, @corruption and renewal; abandoning religious dogmas, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion, @material and spiritual existence; two books
